event: CRV (Curve DAO) liquidation cascade / whale-unwind 2024-06-12→2024-06-13 — Egorov's ~9-figure CRV-collateralized borrows force-liquidated across 5 lenders as CRV crashed ~28-34%. On the Fraxlend CRV/FRAX pair (0x3835a58CA93Cdb5f912519ad366826aC9a752510) the CRV collateral drained 57,927,278 → 931,126 CRV = -98.4% over the 24h window (June 13 00:00→12:00), a REAL on-chain MEASURED near-total wipe (Alchemy archive CRV.balanceOf @ blocks 20079184 / 20082760). First sustained-DRAIN / WHALE_UNWIND case in the set; CRV is a free-floating altcoin (no peg) so DEPEG must stay silent. RE-CAPTURE NOTE: this draft is a DATA-ONLY measured backfill — judgment (should_fire/must_not_fire/severity/case-id/now) is IDENTICAL to label.json; only measured numbers + notes changed. Measured fidelity 94.1% (16/17 inputs on-chain; only the documented ~$0.22 intraday CEX low stays asserted as off-chain).
source: On-chain Alchemy Ethereum archive (all decisive inputs MEASURED): CRV.balanceOf(0x3835a58C..2510) = 63,211,603.92 CRV @ 19825201 (2024-05-08), 57,927,278.35 @ 20079184 (2024-06-13 00:00), 931,126.19 @ 20082760 (2024-06-13 12:00); CRV.totalSupply @ each block; Chainlink CRV/USD 0xCd627aA1.. = $0.4251 / $0.3621 / $0.2834; Fraxlend totalAsset.amount & totalBorrow.amount -> utilization 0.7724 / 0.8322 / 0.0116. CRV price/cascade % documented by CoinDesk, Decrypt, Protos, DailyCoin, Blockworks, Arkham, DL News, cryptotimes — see EVENT.md. Fraxlend CRV/FRAX maxLTV ~0.75. The -98.4% 24h drain is ON-CHAIN MEASURED; the window_observation is its host-fed representation. CONTRADICTION FLAGGED: cascade utilization MEASURED 0.0116 (NOT modeled 0.99) — liquidators repaid the FRAX debt, so the liquidity-drop signal is carried by the market-SIZE / collateral collapse, not a utilization spike (judgment unchanged — see notes).

cases.note: MEASURED RE-CAPTURE (judgment unchanged): at the cascade (2024-06-13 12:00, block 20082760) the CRV held by the Fraxlend CRV/FRAX pair (0x3835a58C..2510) was 931,126.19 CRV vs 57,927,278.35 @ block 20079184 (2024-06-13T00:00:00Z) = 931126/57927278 - 1 = -98.393% over 24h — a REAL on-chain MEASURED (Alchemy archive CRV.balanceOf) near-total collateral wipe. The host-fed window_observation encodes this measured drain as change -0.984 (collateral_change, 24h). A -98.4% 24h collateral drain is far beyond an altcoin market's normal tail AND far beyond the ~≥25%/24h absolute actionable floor, so WHALE_UNWIND MUST fire; a near-total collateral wipe in 24h is unambiguously HIGH (CRITICAL would also be defensible — HIGH set as the floor). must_not_fire DEPEG: CRV is a free-floating altcoin with NO peg — its price crash (MEASURED Chainlink CRV/USD $0.3621 -> $0.2834 across the window, with a documented ~$0.22 off-chain intraday CEX low) is a market sell-off, not a peg deviation; the edge oracle is MARKET-type (depeg_sensitive=false) so firing DEPEG would be a sign/semantics error. The actionable exposure signal is the collateral DRAIN, not a peg. current_usd 263,885 = MEASURED 931,126.19 CRV × MEASURED $0.2834 (was modeled ~20.8M from a pre-cascade figure; the post-cascade collateral USD is correctly ~$0.26M — the drain is the point, and the obs change -0.984 is unchanged).

Calm control, 2024-05-08 (a month before the cascade): MEASURED Chainlink CRV/USD = $0.4251 (stable altcoin band), Egorov's leveraged CRV positions intact, NO forced liquidations. The Fraxlend CRV/FRAX pair held 63,211,603.92 CRV (MEASURED, block 19825201) — stable, no drain; MEASURED utilization 0.7724 (healthy). current_usd 26,869,104 = MEASURED 63,211,603.92 CRV × MEASURED $0.4251. The host-fed window_observation carries a routine -0.01 (1% DRAIN) of CRV collateral over 24h — normal day-to-day fluctuation (asserted: no paired prev-block snapshot for this calm baseline; routine noise far below both the market's normal tail bound and the ~≥25%/24h absolute floor). WHALE_UNWIND, UTIL_LIQUIDITY_DROP, and DEPEG must ALL stay silent, and max_emitted is WARN with count 0 (nothing at WARN-or-above may fire). This proves the sustained-drain detector keys on a genuine large cumulative drain, not on ordinary collateral noise — the negative control for the cascade case.

MEASURED RE-CAPTURE (judgment unchanged): single-step hourly-poll (snapshot-diff) view of the SAME real Fraxlend CRV-collateral wipe, complementary to the cumulative window_observation case (crv-collateral-cascade-drain). prev = crv_predrain.json (2024-06-13T00:00:00Z, block 20079184, edge CRV-fraxlend-collateral core_weight MEASURED 57,927,278.35 CRV / $20.98M at MEASURED $0.3621) and curr = crv_cascade.json (2024-06-13T12:00:00Z, block 20082760, same edge core_weight MEASURED 931,126.19 CRV / $0.26M at MEASURED $0.2834). A single poll step therefore shows the pair's CRV collateral going 57,927,278 → 931,126 CRV = -98.4% — a REAL on-chain MEASURED (Alchemy archive balanceOf) near-total collateral OUTFLOW in one ~12h poll interval as Egorov's leveraged CRV positions were force-liquidated. That single near-total outflow is SIMULTANEOUSLY two distinct exposure facts on the same edge. (1) WHALE_UNWIND — the monitored token (the CRV collateral) is fleeing / being seized out of the venue, a forced whale-scale unwind. (2) UTIL_LIQUIDITY_DROP — the market's own size/liquidity collapses: the CRV collateral exposure (core_weight market_size_usd) falls from ~$20.98M to ~$0.26M (-98.7%), so the venue effectively ceases to be a usable CRV-collateral market. A -98.4% single-step outflow of a ~$21M position is far past any HIGH floor for either signal (CRITICAL would also be defensible — HIGH set as the minimum), so BOTH must fire at ≥HIGH. MEASURED-DATA NOTE / CONTRADICTION (does NOT change the judgment): the pair's UTILIZATION ratio MEASURED 0.8322 -> 0.0116 (it FELL, not rose to the previously-modeled 0.99) because liquidators REPAID the FRAX debt (totalBorrow.amount 14.84M -> 0.10M FRAX) while seizing collateral; concurrently the FRAX supplied liquidity (totalAsset.amount) fell 17.84M -> 9.04M = -49.3%. So UTIL_LIQUIDITY_DROP is justified by the collapse in the CRV-collateral market SIZE / liquidity (core_weight -98.7%, supplied liquidity -49.3%), NOT by a utilization spike — the earlier hand-modeled 0.99 utilization was wrong and is corrected here to the measured 0.0116. must_not_fire DEPEG: CRV is a free-floating, unpegged altcoin with no peg/backing target (the edge oracle is MARKET-type, depeg_sensitive=false); its concurrent ~28-34% price crash is a market sell-off, not a peg break — a DEPEG firing here would be a semantics error. This snapshot-diff case proves the wipe is detectable from a raw prev→curr core_weight delta (the hourly-poll path), independently of whether a pre-aggregated cumulative window_observation is supplied (the path exercised by crv-collateral-cascade-drain).
